name: electron-ai-workspace
description: Add multi-provider AI, model pricing, vector search, and persistent AI SDK conversations to Electron desktop apps.

interface.shortDescription: Add chat, RAG, providers, and pricing to Electron
interface.longDescription: Extend an Electron desktop foundation with multi-provider Vercel AI SDK routing, unified reasoning controls, LiteLLM pricing data, PGLite pgvector embeddings, semantic search, and UIMessage-native conversation persistence. Designed to layer on the Eastechs Electron Desktop plugin or an equivalent base stack.
defaultPrompt: Add a complete AI workspace layer to this Electron app.
Add multi-provider model routing and reasoning controls.
Add persistent chat and semantic document search.
